CREATE REMOTE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS schema_name.table_name (id INT, name VARCHAR(100), created_at TIMESTAMP) ON 'mapi:monetdb://localhost:50000/dbname';
CREATE REMOTE TABLE schema_name.another_table (user_id INT, user_email VARCHAR(255)) ON 'mapi:monetdb://192.168.1.10:50000/remoteDB';

CREATE REMOTE TABLE schema_name.complex_table (item_id INT, description TEXT, price DECIMAL(10, 2)) ON 'mapi:monetdb://remotehost:50001/inventory_db' WITH USER 'remote_user' PASSWORD 'securepassword';
CREATE REMOTE TABLE schema_name.table_with_nested (nested_id INT, nested_value INT, FOREIGN KEY (nested_id) REFERENCES schema_name.parent_table(id)) ON 'mapi:monetdb://host:50000/dbname';
CREATE REMOTE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS schema_name.new_table (field1 CHAR(10), field2 VARCHAR(255), field3 DATE) ON 'mapi:monetdb://remote_host:60000/another_db';
CREATE REMOTE TABLE schema_name.joined_table (join_id INT, info TEXT) ON 'mapi:monetdb://host2:50002/join_db';

CREATE REMOTE TABLE schema_name.table_with_encryption (account_id INT, account_name VARCHAR(150)) ON 'mapi:monetdb://remotehost:50000/secure_db' WITH USER 'secure_user' ENCRYPTED PASSWORD 'encryptedPassword';
CREATE REMOTE TABLE schema_name.test_table (test_id INT PRIMARY KEY, test_value JSON) ON 'mapi:monetdb://localhost:50000/test_db';

CREATE REMOTE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS schema_name.composite_table (comp_id INT, attr1 VARCHAR(50), attr2 TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (comp_id) REFERENCES schema_name.another_table(user_id)) ON 'mapi:monetdb://172.20.10.4:50000/composite_db';
